ddls:
CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "size_marking" TEXT /* Size classification of the breed (e.g., B, F, F1) */,
  "breed_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the breed */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country or region where the breed originated */,
  "lifespan" TEXT /* Average lifespan of the breed */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Average weight range of the breed */,
  "coat_type" TEXT /* Type of coat (e.g., short, long, curly) */,
  "coat_color" TEXT /* Common coat colors for the breed */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the breed (e.g., high, moderate, low) */,
  "temperament" TEXT /* Typical temperament of the breed (e.g., friendly, independent, energetic) */,
  "grooming_requirements" TEXT /* Grooming needs of the breed (e.g., weekly brushing, occasional baths) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breed_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed to which the measurements apply */,
  "length_inches" TEXT /* Length measurement in inches (or cm) */,
  "circumference_inches" TEXT /* Circumference measurement in inches (or cm) */,
  "eye_line_inches" TEXT /* Eye line measurement in inches (or cm) */,
  "neck_circumference_inches" TEXT /* Neck circumference measurement in inches (or cm) */,
  "width_inches" TEXT /* Width measurement in inches (or cm) */,
  "height_inches" TEXT /* Height measurement in inches (or cm) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the measurement_units table */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the breed in the specified unit */,
  "chest_depth" TEXT /* Chest depth measurement */,
  "shoulder_height" TEXT /* Shoulder height measurement */,
  "ear_length" TEXT /* Ear length measurement */,
  "tail_length" TEXT /* Tail length measurement */,
  "ear_type" TEXT /* Type of ears (e.g., floppy, pointy) */,
  "eye_color" TEXT /* Common eye colors for the breed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breed_measurements_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breed_measurements_measurement_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., length, circumference) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breed_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed category (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breed_category_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category assigned to the breed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breed_category_assignments_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_breed_category_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES breed_categories ("category_id")
)
